algorithm: Comparative OFDM CFR estimation: LS-linear/spline, DFT-truncated LS, LMMSE-Wiener

constraints.complexity: Include at least one interpolation-only low-complexity method with no large matrix inversion, and at least one covariance/model-aided method; any explicit inversion must be dimension <= 16x16 (pilot-domain).

raw_results.algorithm: Comparative OFDM CFR estimation: LS-linear/spline, DFT-truncated LS, LMMSE-Wiener

report_assets.problem_summary: Estimate full 64-tone CFR from 16 noisy comb pilots and evaluate non-pilot NMSE vs SNR.
report_assets.solution_summary: Implemented all required baselines plus covariance-aided LMMSE; included DFT-Lt and pilot-density sensitivity.
report_assets.evaluation_summary: 500 MC trials/SNR over 0:2:30 dB with 95% CI bands, runtime and FLOPs comparison.
